{"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"get parcels in Trondheim"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class"},{"step":3,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"join parcels with hazard areas"},{"step":4,"action":"filter","database":null,"purpose":"filter by area and municipality"},{"step":5,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"sort by area descending"},{"step":6,"action":"select_columns","database":null,"purpose":"select required columns"}]}

{"sql":"SELECT teig.gid, teig.kommunenummer, teig.kommunenavn, teig.lagretberegnetareal, kvikkleirefaresoneavgr.objid FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig teig JOIN kvikkleire.kvikkleire_87067f98e29a47d4901328f3a926a515.kvikkleirefaresoneavgr kvikkleirefaresoneavgr ON ST_Intersects(teig.geom, kvikkleirefaresoneavgr.grense) WHERE teig.kommunenavn = 'Trondheim' AND teig.lagretberegnetareal > 5000 AND kvikkleirefaresoneavgr.objtype = 'HØY' ORDER BY teig.lagretberegnetareal DESC LIMIT 10;","databaseName":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","step_number":1}
